title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Co-Scientist, a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system designed to iteratively generate, debate, and evolve novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems. The system aims to accelerate scientific breakthroughs by partnering with researchers to formulate and refine testable hypotheses.
